story_to_visual_carrier_records.carrier_reason: selected by business action, proof payload, existing Run 2.15 layout capacity, and Run 2.51 socket availability
story_to_visual_carrier_records.text_socket_requirement: all public copy units must bind to Run 2.61 socket fusion contract
story_to_visual_carrier_records.fallback_if_over_capacity: split proof payload to viewer and preserve the dominant visual carrier
